name: esp32_retro_futurist_a1_handoff
description: Bambu Studio handoff for the retro-futurist ESP32 enclosure using a hybrid two-color workflow on an A1 with AMS lite.

parts.name: retro_lid_accent
parts.notes: Separate printed accent that stays side-by-side on the plate.

parts.name: retro_base
parts.notes: Base printed on its own plate to keep the lid workflow clean.

notes: Use Bambu Studio as the final 3MF serializer. Raw STEP/STL imports are only geometry handoff.
The preferred automation path is Studio GUI or an MCP wrapper that drives Studio end-to-end.
Use Studio CLI only on hosts where --export-3mf has been verified to work without crashing.
seed_template_3mf is optional but recommended for repeatable A1 + AMS lite output. It should point to a known-good Studio-authored project template.
